III. |[PRESERVATION OF DRAFTS + PROMPTS]|

To ensure nothing is ever lost:
• I will generate SYS_EXPAND_PHASE_2.5_MASTER.txt
• Full log of all input/output for that phase
• Labelled per entry (e.g., P2.5A_ARTISTvsPROJECT)
• iPhone compatible (Notes chunk size respected)
• You will be able to copy each entry individually into:
• Mobile Notes
• GitHub repository
• Notion or desktop .md reader

⸻

NEXT ACTIONS
1. Paste any peer questions or summaries into the system
2. Confirm you’d like SYS_EXPAND_PHASE_2.5_MASTER.txt generated next
3. Approve creation of standard Index Card Template per module:
• Title
• Ref ID
• Logic mode
